compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for overlay findings resolution loop integration
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create tests for overlay findings entering the resolution loop and tracking ticket creation for minor findings.

### Test approach
Create mock overlay findings at critical/important severity, invoke the resolution integration function, assert they enter the resolution loop. Create mock minor findings, assert tracking tickets are created. Verify single-writer compliance: assert overlay findings are NOT written directly to reviewer-findings.json by overlay agents.

### Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] At least 3 test cases (critical enters loop, minor creates ticket, single-writer)
  Verify: grep -c "^test_\|--- test_" tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry added
  Verify: grep -q "overlay-resolution" .test-index
